summary: Phase 2 feature testing complete. All 17 features verified. Backend API tests (16/16 passed). Fixed 1 bug: EmpresaDetalle lightbox logo overlay was checking wrong field (empresa.logo instead of empresa.logo_url).
passed_tests: Admin Settings page (/admin/configuracion) loads with carousel editor UI showing slides with image upload, title, subtitle fields
Admin Settings can save WhatsApp number with international format (+52) and visibility toggle
PUT /api/settings accepts hero_slides array, whatsapp_number and whatsapp_visible fields
Home page hero carousel shows the configured slide images with prev/next controls
Admin Nosotros (/admin/nosotros-editor) shows editable numeralia/stats with Nombre corto and Nombre largo fields
Home page stats section displays numeralia from nosotros-settings using short_label (e.g., 'Destinos')
Nosotros page stats section displays numeralia using long label (e.g., 'Destinos Naturales')
WhatsApp floating button appears on public pages when whatsapp_visible=true and number is set
WhatsApp floating button does NOT appear on admin pages
Prensa detail page (/prensa/:slug) renders galeria section if article has gallery images
Article form in admin has gallery upload section with ImageUploader
Empresa detail lightbox overlays empresa logo in bottom-right corner (FIXED: was checking empresa.logo instead of empresa.logo_url)
EmpresaForm gallery now has ImageUploader for file upload (not just URL paste)
Admin mobile sidebar: overlay appears at z-40, sidebar at z-50, header at z-30 - no overlap
Empresas page with ?categoria=... shows dynamic hero with category image
Empresas page without category filter shows standard title layout
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSettings.jsx: Carousel editor correctly limits to 3 slides with add/remove functionality
AdminNosotros.jsx: Numeralia section has both short_label (Index) and label (Nosotros) fields
Home.jsx: Stats section correctly uses short_label from nosotros-settings
Nosotros.jsx: Stats section correctly uses label (long) from nosotros-settings
WhatsAppButton.jsx: Correctly hides on admin pages using location.pathname.startsWith('/admin')
AdminLayout.jsx: z-index hierarchy correct (header z-30, overlay z-40, sidebar z-50)
Empresas.jsx: Dynamic hero shows when category filter is applied with category image
EmpresaForm.jsx: Gallery section has ImageUploader component for file upload
ArticuloForm.jsx: Gallery section has ImageUploader component for file upload
ArticuloDetalle.jsx: Gallery renders correctly when article has galeria array
seed_data_creation: Added gallery images to article 'bienvenidos-al-cluster' for testing prensa gallery feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features verified complete. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/settings (hero_slides, whatsapp_number, whatsapp_visible), GET/PUT /api/nosotros-settings (stats with short_label/label). Fixed bug in EmpresaDetalle.jsx lightbox logo overlay (changed empresa.logo to empresa.logo_url). WhatsApp is currently enabled (whatsapp_visible=true). All admin forms have ImageUploader for gallery uploads. Mobile sidebar z-index is correct.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Code was checking empresa.logo but data has empresa.logo_url
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed empresa.logo to empresa.logo_url in lines 501-510

feature_verification.1_hero_carousel_admin: VERIFIED - AdminSettings.jsx has carousel editor with up to 3 slides
feature_verification.2_whatsapp_config_admin: VERIFIED - AdminSettings.jsx has WhatsApp number input and visibility toggle
feature_verification.4_settings_api_whatsapp: VERIFIED - PUT /api/settings handles whatsapp_number and whatsapp_visible
feature_verification.5_home_hero_carousel: VERIFIED - Home.jsx shows carousel with prev/next controls
feature_verification.6_numeralia_admin: VERIFIED - AdminNosotros.jsx has short_label and label fields
feature_verification.7_home_stats_short_label: VERIFIED - Home.jsx uses short_label from nosotros-settings
feature_verification.8_nosotros_stats_long_label: VERIFIED - Nosotros.jsx uses label (long) from nosotros-settings
feature_verification.9_whatsapp_public_pages: VERIFIED - WhatsAppButton.jsx shows on public pages when enabled
feature_verification.12_articulo_form_gallery: VERIFIED - ArticuloForm.jsx has ImageUploader for gallery
feature_verification.13_empresa_lightbox_logo: VERIFIED (FIXED) - EmpresaDetalle.jsx shows logo in lightbox
feature_verification.14_empresa_form_gallery: VERIFIED - EmpresaForm.jsx has ImageUploader for gallery
feature_verification.15_mobile_sidebar_zindex: VERIFIED - AdminLayout.jsx has correct z-index (overlay z-40, sidebar z-50)
feature_verification.16_empresas_category_hero: VERIFIED - Empresas.jsx shows dynamic hero with category image
feature_verification.17_empresas_standard_layout: VERIFIED - Empresas.jsx shows standard title without category filter
